## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy src`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Docker/runtime smoke test passes, if deployment behavior changed

## Deployment impact

- [ ] No deployment impact
- [ ] Requires image rebuild/redeploy
- [ ] Requires environment/config changes

## Security considerations

- [ ] No auth/secret/logging/networking changes
- [ ] Auth, secret handling, logging, networking, or container hardening changed
